products_sold.description: List of products sold by merchant (i.e. Firearms (in accordance with ATF definition), firearms parts, accessories, ammunition, explosives).

states_shipped.description: List all states that merchant ships to.

has_federal_firearms_license.description: Merchant has an active and good-standing FFL license: 'yes', 'no', or 'not_applicable'

has_federal_firearms_license_adverse_act.description: Has Merchant or any principal of company had adverse action taken against an FFL license (i.e. revocation, willful violations, etc)? 'yes' or 'no'

federal_firearms_license_adverse_actions.description: Description of adverse actions taken against FFL license

has_export_controls.description: Merchant has controls in place to block/prohibit transactions & shipment outside of the United States: 'yes' or 'no'

routing_controls.description: What controls does merchant have in place to ensure proper MCC coding and routing in accordance with state law? If not applicable, state ‘N/A’.

has_nfa_registration.description: Merchant has obtained NFA registration and registered inventory with the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF): 'yes', 'no', or 'not_applicable'

are_customers_identified.description: Customers are identified via government issued identification: 'yes', 'no', or 'not_applicable'

customers_identified_not_applicable_reas.description: Reason why customer identification is not applicable

are_background_checks_performed.description: Background checks are performed on all customers via NICS or state point of contact: 'yes', 'no', or 'not_applicable'

background_checks_performed_not_applicab.description: Reason why customer background checks are not applicable

has_sales_only_to_non_prohibited_person.description: Gun sales are only completed if the buyer is not a prohibited person: 'yes', 'no', or 'not_applicable'

has_buyer_complete_atf_form_4473.description: The prospective buyer must complete and ATF Form 4473 (Firearms Transaction Record): 'yes', 'no', or 'not_applicable'

atf_form_4473_retention_period.description: If yes, completed ATF Forms 4473 are retained by the dealer for a period of.

has_buyer_complete_atf_form_33104.description: The prospective buyer will complete Form 3310.4 (Report of Multiple Sale or Other Disposition of Pistols and Revolvers) if they are an unlicensed person purchasing or acquiring two or more handguns at one time or during five consecutive business days: 'yes', 'no', or 'not_applicable'

atf_form_33104_retention_period.description: If yes, completed Form 3310.4 are retained by the dealer for a period of

shipment_controls.description: What controls are in place to ensure proper shipment of firearms in accordance with Federal law (i.e. shipping only to licensed FFL, completing Form 1508 to ship via UPS, USPS, or Fedex, etc). It not applicable, state ‘N/A’.

shipping_policies.description: What are your policies and procedures for shipping a firearm (who does the shipping, proof of delivery, shipping to dealers)?
shipping_policies.example: Confirm the receiving dealer or gunsmith is licensed.

other_shipping_policy.description: If 'Other' was selected for shipping policies, please describe.
